data.name: tableLayoutPanel2.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="label4" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="label5" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="label6" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="label7" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_binsRuleCombo" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="_customBinsNud" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="_showCumulativeCheck" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="3" /><Control Name="_barColorSwatch" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lineColorSwatch" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_barColorTextBox" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lineColorTextBox" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0" /><Rows Styles="AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,Absolute,20" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: tableLayoutPanel3.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="_blueBandNud" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_greenBandNud" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="label8" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="label9" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="label10" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="label11" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_redBandNud" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_interpolationCombo" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="AutoSize,0,Percent,100" /><Rows Styles="AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,Absolute,20" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: tableLayoutPanel1.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="_languageCombo" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_bandwidthMethodCombo" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="label1" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="label2" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="label3" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_defaultKernelCombo" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="AutoSize,0,Percent,100" /><Rows Styles="AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,Absolute,20" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: tableLayoutPanel4.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="_showLegendCheck" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_showAxisLabelsCheck" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="AutoSize,0" /><Rows Styles="AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0" /></TableLayoutSettings>
